name: houdini-language-server
description: Language Server for Houdini GraphQL directives

scripts.build: tsup src/server.ts --format cjs --clean && npm run add-shebang
scripts.add-shebang: grep -q '^#!/usr/bin/env node' dist/server.js || sed -i '' '1s/^/\#\!\/usr\/bin\/env node\n/' dist/server.js && chmod +x dist/server.js
